name: GIGA METALS CORP.  O.N.
summary: GIGA METALS CORP. O.N. (formerly Hard Creek Nickel Corp) is a Canadian company focused on developing significant nickel and cobalt resources. The company's primary asset is the Turnagain Nickel-Cobalt project located in British Columbia, Canada. Giga Metals aims to become a major supplier of nickel and cobalt for the electric vehicle battery market.
